article_title: B.C. Reg. 249/2025 – British Columbia Securities Commission

briefs.title: Investment Fund Cost Disclosure Rules Overhauled Under NI 31-103 Effective January 2026
briefs.summary: BC Reg. 249/2025 amends National Instrument 31-103, effective January 1, 2026, introducing new definitions for fund expense ratio, direct investment fund charges, and requiring fund managers to provide per-security fund expense data to dealers and advisers for client reporting.
briefs.action_required: Ensure your compliance and reporting systems capture and deliver per-security fund expense data to dealers and advisers by January 1, 2026.

key_dates.label: BC NI 31-103 amended cost disclosure rules take effect

briefs.article_title: B.C. Reg. 249/2025 – British Columbia Securities Commission
